summary: Iteration 68: Verified bug fixes for Hive album clickability and Honeypot photo display. Backend API structure verified. Frontend code review confirms correct implementation of AlbumLink with e.stopPropagation, active:scale feedback, and ListingDetailModal photos[0] priority. UI testing limited by empty DB and rate limiting, but ListingDetailModal successfully tested.

issues: External image CDN (Discogs, Unsplash) returning 403 errors - likely rate limiting

Backend: GET /api/listings listings have photo_urls field (array) - PASSED
Backend: Listing has 3 photos in photo_urls field - PASSED
Frontend: ListingDetailModal opens when clicking listing card - PASSED
Frontend: ListingDetailModal shows 3 photo thumbnails - PASSED
Frontend: ListingDetailModal shows $150 price correctly - PASSED
Frontend: ListingDetailModal shows condition 'Very Good Plus' - PASSED
Frontend: ListingDetailModal close button works - PASSED

Code Review: AlbumLink has cursor-pointer class - PASSED
Code Review: AlbumLink has data-testid='album-link-{id}' - PASSED

hive_album_clickability.description: AlbumLink component correctly implements click handling with e.stopPropagation, visual feedback (active:scale), and proper data-testid attributes
hive_album_clickability.note: Could not fully UI test due to empty feed (no posts from followed users)

listing_photo_priority.description: ListingDetailModal prioritizes uploaded photos over Discogs cover
listing_photo_priority.ui_verified: Modal opened with 3 photo thumbnails visible

listing_card_thumbnail.code_location: ISOPage.js line 999: const mainImage = (listing.photo_urls?.length > 0) ? listing.photo_urls[0] : listing.cover_url

critical_code_review_comments: All bug fixes verified via code review - implementations are correct
AlbumLink properly uses e.stopPropagation() to prevent parent card click interference
AlbumLink has active:scale-[0.98] for visual click feedback
ISOCard now constructs record-like object and wraps in AlbumLink with onAlbumClick
ListingDetailModal correctly prioritizes photos[0] over cover_url
RadixUI accessibility warnings should be addressed (missing DialogTitle/Description)

success_rate.backend: 100% (3/3 listing tests passed, feed tests skipped due to auth rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (ListingDetailModal UI verified, code review confirms all fixes)

seed_data_creation: Created NOW_SPINNING and ISO posts for testing (post IDs: ecae3b2f-e22e-43aa-86a0-27b2566653c4, 83589c48-fa66-4a93-9161-8005a9cb3f37)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 verified bug fixes: (1) AlbumLink in PostCards.js has e.stopPropagation() + active:scale feedback + cursor-pointer + data-testid. (2) ISOCard wraps in AlbumLink with cover art display. (3) ListingDetailModal uses photos[0] || cover_url for main image. (4) ISOPage ListingCard uses photo_urls[0] for thumbnail. Auth rate limiting affected some backend tests - may need to wait before running login-heavy tests. DB has 1 listing (Miles Davis - Kind of Blue) with 3 photos. Test user direct66 has 4 records and 2 new posts created this iteration.
limitations_encountered: Auth rate limiting prevented full backend API testing
Hive feed was empty (user not following anyone with posts) - could not fully UI test album clickability
External image CDNs (Discogs, Unsplash) returning 403 errors - affects image display in screenshots
